rows.label: tev062401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire

rows.label: tev062401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nana about White Woods.

rows.label: tev062401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss

rows.label: tev062401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev062401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nana about the Growth.

rows.label: tev062401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Nana about the battle with the Zu Pharg.

rows.label: tev062401_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Nana about the Growth.

rows.label: tev062401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Nana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev062401_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Nana about recent developments.

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0001
rows.name:
Very dangerous types are skulking
about on west side of Lake Ciel.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Nana and friends tend to avoid area
thereabouts for just that reason.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Big friend look stronger than most,
but friend should still be careful
if planning to pass through.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0004
rows.name:
After all, friend needs to
come home safe and spend small
fortune at shop of Nana![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0009
rows.name:
Nana is like jack-of-all-trades
here in Dopang Caravan.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Might Nana recommend the latest and greatest
to discerning customer like friend?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0011
rows.name:
This yabuyabu ointment was found
locally, and can be yours for absurdly
low price of only 1,000,000 credits![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0012
rows.name:
...Mo? Not interested? Friend
must not understand market very
well. This is going rate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Nana need to find new friend
with looser purse strings.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0018
rows.name:
Once, Growth in Hilal Stronghold
to west came here to pick fight.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0019
rows.name:
They start ranting and raving about how
Nana and friends need to surrender. Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0020
rows.name:
So Nana just pretend to surrender,
then sell Growth useless junk at
ridiculously high prices.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0021
rows.name:
Bad guys are very strong,
but not very smart.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0026
rows.name:
Such sizzling battle! Every Nopon
watched with bated breath.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0027
rows.name:
Was that friend fighting with
giant robot? Next time, friend
need to tell Nana in advance.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0028
rows.name:
That way Nana can whip up crowd and
make them pay through nose for snacks.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0033
rows.name: Nana hear all about fall of Growth![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0034
rows.name:
This is big relief. Nana was making up
products like "toughen-up fruit" and
"heal-it-all grass" and selling them to Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0035
rows.name:
Good thing they all died before
finding out products were bogus![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0036
rows.name:
Actually, both fruit and grass
give friends the runs. So maybe
bogus food killed Growth...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG0037
rows.name:
Human friends should be thanking Nana
for vital role in major victory! Mo-mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG1001
rows.name:
Hello, friend! How can
jack-of-all-trades Nana help?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG1002
rows.name:
Maybe friend would like to be proud
owner of all new super-starchy dress
that Kutta try to dump on Nana?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG1003
rows.name:
Dress is probably too small for friend,
but would make truly lovely hat![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG1004
rows.name:
And it can belong to friend for
low price of ONLY 1,000,000 credits!
Act now! Supply so limited![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG2001
rows.name:
Nana try to scam lovey-dovey newlyweds
into buying surplus junk...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG2002
rows.name:
Uh, Nana mean that Nana want to give Nio
first dibs on extra-special products![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG2003
rows.name:
But Popo forbid Nio from wasting
money, so Nio stop buying from Nana.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG2004
rows.name:
Why did Nio have to marry sensible Nopon?!
What will Nana do now that biggest chump
has put away loose wallet for good? Mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev062401_MSG2005
rows.name:
Kutta put Nana in major pickle by bringing
Nana so many useless products to sell. Kutta
need more discerning eye for market![ST:wait ]
